3051340.name: need TWO survive
3051340.description:
horror co-op game, try to escape from the horrible death trap of the mad scientist: Pas Fin.
Good luck :)


You and your friend wake up in a strange cell, you quickly find out that your are being monitored by a strange scientist by the name "Pas Fin".
Your now stuck in his strange test chamber, trying to find an exit to stop this nightmare, and perhaps escape.

Each puzzle you encounter will need team work and efficiency to complete. so pick your best buddy and try to solve the unsanitary trap of the mad scientist.


this game isn't very long, its a short experience of 30 min max with coop element. BUT there is a secret end to unlock and MANY secrets and easter egg, so good luck!


What should customers know about the Mature Content in your game?:

the game has gore, blood, organs and a lot of off putting joke, be aware!!! 18+



this 3D experience was build from the ground up by our team of four devloppers as a school project.
this game was made by:
Dominic Gibeau
Olivier Dorion
David Rousseau
Massimo Trimboli


this game is exculisvly in french

MUST BE PLAYED WITH TWO CONTROLERS!
3051340.supported_languages:
英语, 法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
